content: Recharts is the 2026 default React charting library (48.9M weekly downloads), SVG-based, declarative JSX API, ideal for dashboards with small/medium datasets (line/area/bar charts cover 90% of cases). Chart.js/react-chartjs-2 (Canvas) is better for high-frequency updates or 1000+ point datasets. visx (D3 primitives, Airbnb) offers max control but 2-3x longer build time, only worth it for highly custom visualizations. For a temperature trend/range chart over ~30 days, Recharts is the right fit.
